caption: A woman with dark hair and a smiling expression is captured in a medium shot, wearing a blue and white pinstriped button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones. She is positioned in an indoor setting with light-colored walls, a beige curtain, and a blue curtain visible in the background. Throughout the sequence, she maintains a positive demeanor, speaking and smiling as her facial expressions shift slightly. In the lower-left corner of each shot, the on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" is visible. The background remains static, and the woman's position stays consistent, with only the subtle movements of her mouth and eyes changing as she talks.
